nodes.label: AI as collaborative material generator for teaching
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or unrealistic example provider
nodes.grounding_span: I get them to give me more capacious examples of the target language

nodes.label: AI as stimulator of own ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of unusable output
nodes.grounding_span: they stimulate ideas for me to give my own examples

nodes.label: AI adherence to conversational naturalness
nodes.label_negative: AI reverting to formal or unnatural examples
nodes.grounding_span: it gives uncommon and unnatural uses of the words

nodes.label: AI as persona simulator for learner errors
nodes.label_negative: AI producing unrealistic or outlandish mistakes
nodes.grounding_span: adopt the persona of someone whose native language isn't English

nodes.label: AI for material preparation vs. real-time teaching judgment
nodes.label_negative: AI for lesson planning and student adaptation
nodes.grounding_span: the AI helps me prepare the materials I use in the lesson

nodes.label: Teaching effectiveness and student comprehension
nodes.grounding_span: helps them know how to use the language in question

nodes.label: Professional efficiency and marginal gains
nodes.grounding_span: producing the same amount of quality work in a shorter timeframe

nodes.label: Personal creativity and autonomy in teaching
nodes.grounding_span: I just judge that by myself in terms of how I think their progress is going

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI generating novel examples
nodes.grounding_span: I feel satisfied with it when it comes up with examples of target vocabulary, especially that I hadn't considered

nodes.label: Frustration with AI forgetting instructions and reverting
nodes.grounding_span: I get frustrated with it when it gives uncommon and unnatural uses of the words

nodes.label: Contentment with current AI role, no desire for more complex AI
nodes.grounding_span: it does what I need it to do, and I can't imagine a more sophisticated version of the current AI doing much more for me

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth refinement — multi-turn conversational approach
Pragmatic filtering — discarding unusable output while leveraging useful parts
nodes.grounding_span: I just filter them out myself and move on
